message:
fix(net): use AtomicBool/AtomicU32 for VirtualTcpStream nodelay and ttl

set_nodelay and set_ttl take &self (not &mut self) per the TcpStreamApi
trait, but the fields were plain bool/u32.  Replace with atomics so the
methods actually store the value instead of silently discarding it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
